% ── SUMMARY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Summary}

Data Analyst \& AI Engineer with 2+ years at ADP --- built analytics dashboards tracking 10K+ payroll audit cases/month, automated risk classification to 80\% precision (25\% fewer false positives), and drove 30\% operational efficiency gains through data-driven stakeholder insights; open to Critical Skills Employment Permit (CSEP) sponsorship.
      Independently shipped two production data products --- Job Tailor (jobtailor.in) and Keen. Stack: Python, SQL, React/TypeScript, AWS.

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{Data Analyst \& AI Engineer}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Built analytics pipeline processing 10K+ payroll audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records --- automated classification of time fraud, tax miscalculations, and duplicate payments, reducing manual audit effort by 40\%.
  \item Engineered LangChain investigation agents to automate root-cause analysis across payroll anomalies; improved classification precision to 80\% and cut false positives by 25\%, eliminating unnecessary escalations.
  \item Designed React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards enabling auditors to visualize risk patterns and interact with AI-generated insights in real time; improved Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds through stakeholder feedback cycles.
  \item Integrated AWS Bedrock and OpenAI into production HR analytics workflows, communicating model tradeoffs with product and support to improve operational efficiency 30\% and reduce resolution time 25\%.
  \item Built RAG pipelines ingesting IRS codes and state labor laws alongside structured payroll data; automated classification and generated audit trails for every flagged case, eliminating manual regulatory cross-referencing.
  \item Deployed on AWS (Lambda, Step Functions, DynamoDB, RDS, Glue) and Pivotal Cloud Foundry; cut infrastructure costs 40\% and eliminated 15+ hours of manual testing weekly while maintaining 99.9\%+ availability.
  \item Architected Node.js/Express microservices handling 10,000+ daily API calls at \textless{}200 ms latency via connection pooling and caching strategies.
\end{itemize}

  \item Engineered AI analysis layer that cross-references aggregated business data to surface revenue mismatches, audit red flags, and risk discrepancies; exports reports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: React/TypeScript + Python 3.11 + Supabase + Redis.
